name: ruby-connection-pool
title: ruby-connection-pool
description:
generic connection pool for ruby
MongoDB has its own connection pool.  ActiveRecord has its own connection pool.
This is a generic connection pool that can be used with anything, e.g. Redis,
Dalli and other Ruby network clients.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-connection-pool because generic connection pool for ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-connection-pool as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-connection-pool with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-connection-pool --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
